title: Transparent Better GUI
description: Transforms in-game GUIs with a translucent effect! 将游戏内的GUI调整为半透明效果！
body:
### **Resource Pack Name:** Transparent Better GUI  

### **Resource Pack Description:**  

Tired of bulky interfaces blocking the breathtaking views of your Minecraft world? This resource pack aims to eliminate the barrier between you and the game, delivering an unprecedented immersive experience.  

**◆ Core Concept ◆**  
Transforms most of the vanilla Graphical User Interface (GUI) textures into elegant semi-transparent effects. Whether it's the gorgeous title menu background, your meticulously built home, or the perilous landscapes of underground caves, everything will be displayed clearly without obstruction.  

**★ Key Features ★**  

*   **Panoramic Title Menu:** From the moment you launch the game, enjoy an unobstructed view of Minecraft's iconic rotating title background panorama. Every login becomes a refreshing experience.  
*   **Seamless In-Game Experience:**  
    *   **Transparent Inventory & Menus:** When opening your inventory, chests, furnaces, and other interfaces, you can still clearly observe your surroundings. No more worrying about surprise attacks while organizing your items!  
    *   **Subtle HUD:** Critical information such as health, hunger bar, and experience level becomes soft and unobtrusive. It blends into the background when not needed yet remains clear and readable when necessary.  
    *   **Transparent Chat & Notifications:** The backgrounds of chat messages and system prompts are now transparent, ensuring communication without compromising your field of view.  

**▼ Important Notes ▼**  

*   This resource pack is primarily a **visual enhancement** and is fully compatible with vanilla gameplay. It does not alter any game mechanics.  
*   Designed for **Minecraft Java Edition**. Please ensure the pack is enabled in your settings.  
*   The transparency effect applies to almost all GUI elements, including the world selection screen, pause menu, and more, providing a comprehensive visually transparent experience.  

**Download now and unlock a clearer, broader, and more immersive block world!**

---

### **资源包名称：** 更好的透明界面 [Transparent Better GUI]

### **资源包介绍：**

厌倦了厚重的界面遮挡住Minecraft世界的壮丽景色？本资源包旨在消除您与游戏世界之间的隔阂，为您带来前所未有的沉浸式体验。

**◆ 核心理念 ◆**
将原版游戏中大部分用户界面（GUI）材质转换为优雅的半透明效果。让华丽的标题菜单背景、您精心建造的家园、以及险象环生的地下洞穴景观都能毫无阻碍地呈现在您的眼前。

**★ 主要特性 ★**

*   **全景标题菜单：** 首次进入游戏，即可无遮挡地欣赏Minecraft标志性的旋转标题背景 panorama 全景图，每一次登录都心旷神怡。
*   **无缝游戏内体验：**
    *   **透明背包与菜单：** 打开物品栏、箱子、熔炉等界面时，仍能清晰观察周围环境，再也不用担心在整理背包时被“惊喜”偷袭。
    *   **低调的HUD：** 生命值、饥饿条、经验栏等关键信息显示变得柔和而不突兀，在您不需要时悄然融入背景，需要时又能清晰可读。
    *   **透明聊天框与提示：** 聊天文字和系统提示信息背景变为透明，确保沟通交流的同时，最大程度保留屏幕视野。

**▼ 注意事项 ▼**

*   本资源包主要为**视觉优化**，完全兼容原版游戏，不会修改任何游戏机制。
*   适用于**Minecraft Java版**，请确保在设置中启用了本资源包。
*   透明化处理涉及几乎所有GUI元素，包括选择世界、暂停菜单等，为您提供全方位的视觉通透感。

**即刻下载，解锁一个更清晰、更广阔、更沉浸的方块世界吧！**
